description: Collapsible content panel using native <details>/<summary>. The browser handles expand/collapse natively. JS only syncs the data-label and data-icon attributes into the shadow DOM.

attributes.name: data-label
attributes.description: Heading text for the summary row

attributes.name: data-icon
attributes.description: FontAwesome unicode for optional leading icon

slots.description: Default slot for panel content revealed when expanded

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Trailing action buttons in the summary row
